function.name: research_website
function.description: Crawl the biller's website and return extracted brand tokens, copy, and structure. Backed by the crawler service.

url.description: The biller's website URL to crawl (the biller's own domain).

function.name: update_config
function.description: Apply a JSON merge-patch to the biller's draft BillerConfiguration with brand/bill_type facts extracted from the site. Backed by PATCH /billers/{id}/config. The 'compliance' field is server-written only and any patch touching it is rejected — never include it.

patch.description: Merge-patch limited to fields supported by real evidence from the site.

bill_type.description: Inferred from the org, e.g. Utility, Real Estate Tax
